name: Japanese Egg Custard Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup julienne-cut chicken or diced shrimp, cooked
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. (149 degrees C).
Combine chicken or shrimp and water chestnuts in separate containers.
Divide the mixture evenly between 6 oven-proof custard cups.
Beat eggs, salt, and stock together.
Pour the beaten mixture into each custard cup.
Cover with two spinach or lettuce leaves.
Place filled custard cups in a large pan with 3 inches of boiling water.
Cover the entire pan with silver foil (shiny side to the inside).
Bake for 30 minutes or until set. When a sharp knife is inserted into the custard, it should pull out clean.
